description_long: This is a large, rectangular, industrial-style dumpster constructed primarily from metal, with a weathered green paint finish and visible rust patches along the edges and seams. The dumpster features a flat, hinged lid that can be fully opened, as seen in the images, and is equipped with four small caster wheels for mobility. The lid appears to be made of the same metal as the body and includes a handle for lifting. The front and sides of the dumpster show signs of wear, including scratches, chipped paint, and some faded white stenciled markings. The interior is spacious and open, designed to hold a significant volume of waste or debris. This type of dumpster is commonly found in urban environments, such as alleys, behind commercial buildings, or in parking lots.
description: A large, green, metal dumpster with a flat hinged lid, caster wheels, and visible rust and wear, designed for urban waste collection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat hinged lid partially open, visible wheels, and faded white markings on the front panel.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open lid, interior space, and the side profile of the dumpster with visible rust and wear.
description_view_2: Rear and side view showing the back panel, all four wheels, and the lid fully open and resting on the ground.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the open interior, the flat lid, and the overall rectangular shape of the dumpster.
attribute_lid_type: flat, hinged metal lid, single section, no visible locking mechanism, handle present
attribute_handle_design: single bar handle on the front of the lid, made of metal
attribute_warning_labels: white rectangular sticker with faded text/symbols on the front and side panels
attribute_placement_location: outdoor commercial area or residential alley
